instructions.instruction: Run the main orchestrator script bash scripts/validate_jenkinsfile.sh — not individual sub-scripts directly
instructions.original_snippets: Run complete validation (syntax + security + best practices): bash scripts/validate_jenkinsfile.sh Jenkinsfile...Auto-detects pipeline type, validates syntax, scans for hardcoded credentials, checks best practices

instructions.instruction: For Shared Library files, use bash scripts/validate_shared_library.sh — separate from the main Jenkinsfile validator
instructions.original_snippets: Validate Jenkins Shared Library files using validate_shared_library.sh: bash scripts/validate_shared_library.sh vars/myStep.groovy
instructions.relevant_when: validating vars/*.groovy or src/**/*.groovy shared library files

instructions.instruction: Look up unknown plugin steps by checking references/common_plugins.md first, then Context7 MCP, then WebSearch as fallback
instructions.original_snippets: Check Local Reference First - Read: references/common_plugins.md...Use Context7 MCP...mcp__context7__resolve-library-id with query: 'jenkinsci <plugin-name>-plugin'...Web Search Fallback
instructions.relevant_when: encountering unrecognized steps in a Jenkinsfile (not in common_plugins.md)

instructions.instruction: Report results with line numbers, severity, and actionable suggestions
instructions.original_snippets: Report results with line numbers, severity, and actionable suggestions
instructions.relevant_when: reporting validation findings to the user

instructions.instruction: Provide inline fix suggestions when errors are found — include corrected code snippets directly in the response
instructions.original_snippets: Provide inline fix suggestions when errors are found (include corrected code snippets directly in the response)
instructions.relevant_when: reporting errors or warnings in a Jenkinsfile

instructions.instruction: When Jenkinsfile uses @Library, note all @Library calls and cross-reference the library version being loaded — NEVER validate in isolation
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER validate only the Jenkinsfile without checking Shared Library calls...Note all @Library calls and cross-reference the library version being loaded.
instructions.relevant_when: validating a Jenkinsfile that contains @Library declarations

instructions.instruction: For Declarative pipelines, validate using the Jenkins Declarative Linter — NEVER rely only on Groovy syntax checking
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER skip Declarative Linter validation for Declarative pipelines...Submit the Jenkinsfile to http://<jenkins>/pipeline-model-converter/validate or use the CLI linter.

instructions.instruction: NEVER accept 'no errors' from a linter as a green-light to deploy — validate env vars, credentials, and sh steps exist in the target Jenkins environment
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER accept a 'no errors' result from a linter as a green-light to deploy...validate that sh steps, credentials references, and environment variables exist in the target Jenkins environment.
instructions.relevant_when: completing validation and advising on deployment readiness

instructions.instruction: NEVER leave retry(n) without investigating root cause — it masks flaky steps and increases build time
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER leave retry(n) in production pipelines without understanding why it was added...Investigate why the step is flaky, fix the root cause, and remove the retry.
instructions.relevant_when: encountering retry() in a Jenkinsfile during review

instructions.instruction: For shared library vars/*.groovy: verify call() method exists, NonCPS annotation correctness, CPS compatibility, camelCase naming
instructions.original_snippets: vars/*.groovy: call() method, NonCPS annotation correctness, CPS compatibility, camelCase naming, documentation comments
instructions.relevant_when: validating vars/*.groovy files in a Jenkins Shared Library

instructions.instruction: For shared library src/**/*.groovy: verify package declaration, class-filename match, Serializable implementation
instructions.original_snippets: src/**/*.groovy: package declaration, class-filename match, Serializable implementation, wildcard import warnings, static method CPS compatibility
instructions.relevant_when: validating src/**/*.groovy class files in a Jenkins Shared Library
